ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Brand website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* Brand logo URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "sku_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the SKU */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the variation */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the variation */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the variation */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the variation */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_sku_id FOREIGN KEY ("sku_id") REFERENCES skus ("sku_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option (e.g., color, size) */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the option (e.g., black, small) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skus" (
  "sku_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SKU */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "sku" INTEGER /* SKU value */,
  "upc" TEXT /* UPC value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SKU */,
  "barcode" TEXT /* Barcode value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sku_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skus_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., thumbnail, main) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "sku_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the SKU */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_sku_id FOREIGN KEY ("sku_id") REFERENCES skus ("sku_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "sku_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the SKU */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the order item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_sku_id FOREIGN KEY ("sku_id") REFERENCES skus ("sku_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the brand of the product
Reference to the category of the product
Reference to the type of the product
Name of the option (e.g., color, size)
Value of the option (e.g., black, small)
Type of the image (e.g., thumbnail, main)
Unique identifier for each inventory entry
Unique identifier for each order item
